title: Screen
drDigitalIntro:
Let's meet your laptop's parts, starting with the screen.
• The screen is the part you're looking at right now.
• It's made of millions of tiny colored lights called pixels.
• Together they show everything — words, pictures, and videos.
drDigitalSuccess: That's your screen! Every single thing on your laptop shows up there. Let's look at the next part.
drDigitalHint: No rush — just take a look at your own screen, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
